title: Backend TypeScript Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
BrightWave Technologies is a fast-growing software company specialising in innovative cloud solutions for the financial sector. We pride ourselves on delivering scalable, secure, and high-performance applications.

The Role:
We are seeking a Backend TypeScript Developer to join our dynamic engineering team. You will work closely with product managers and front-end developers to build robust APIs and back-end services. Your main focus will be developing server-side logic using Node.js and TypeScript, ensuring high performance and responsiveness to requests from the front-end.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
- Write clean, scalable, and efficient TypeScript code
- Collaborate with the DevOps team on CI/CD pipelines
- Work with PostgreSQL databases, writing optimized queries and managing schema migrations
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge sharing

Requirements:
- Strong experience with Node.js and TypeScript
- Proficient in Express framework
- Solid understanding of relational databases, preferably PostgreSQL
- Familiarity with RESTful API design principles
- Experience with version control systems like Git
- Excellent problem-solving and communication skills

Salary & Benefits:
- Competitive salary from £45,000 to £60,000 per annum
- Flexible working hours and remote work options
- 25 days annual leave plus bank holidays
- Pension scheme and private healthcare
- Training and professional development budget

How to Apply:
Please send your CV and a cover letter explaining why you’re a great fit to careers@brightwave.tech. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Node.js API Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
QuantumSoft Solutions is a UK-based software consultancy delivering bespoke solutions to clients across retail and logistics. We focus on building scalable backend systems that power mission-critical applications.

The Role:
We are hiring a Node.js API Engineer proficient in TypeScript to develop and maintain our customer-facing APIs. You’ll join a talented team responsible for designing backend services using Node.js and NestJS, ensuring seamless integration with front-end teams and third-party services.

Key Responsibilities:
- Develop new backend features and maintain existing services using Node.js and TypeScript
- Build APIs with NestJS framework following best practices
- Collaborate with database engineers to optimise PostgreSQL queries
- Write unit and integration tests to ensure code quality
- Troubleshoot and resolve production issues

Requirements:
- Strong knowledge of Node.js and TypeScript
- Experience with NestJS framework
- Good understanding of PostgreSQL and relational database design
- Familiarity with RESTful API development
- Experience with automated testing frameworks like Jest or Mocha
- Ability to work effectively in an Agile environment

Salary & Benefits:
- Salary range: £50,000 - £65,000 per year
- Hybrid working model (3 days onsite in Manchester office)
- 28 days holiday plus bank holidays
- Health insurance and wellness programmes
- Support for certifications and conferences

How to Apply:
Interested candidates should submit their CV and portfolio to hr@quantumsoft.co.uk with the subject line 'Node.js API Engineer Application'.

title: Senior Backend Developer (Node.js & TypeScript)
jd_text:
About Us:
Nexa Digital specialises in delivering cutting-edge SaaS solutions for the education sector. We are passionate about creating software that improves learning experiences worldwide.

The Role:
We are looking for a Senior Backend Developer skilled in Node.js and TypeScript to lead backend development projects. You will design and implement scalable APIs and microservices, primarily using NestJS and PostgreSQL.

Responsibilities:
- Lead backend architecture design and implementation using Node.js and TypeScript
- Develop and maintain RESTful APIs with NestJS
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and deliver new features
- Mentor junior developers and conduct code reviews
- Ensure application scalability and security

Requirements:
- Extensive experience with Node.js and TypeScript
- Proven expertise in NestJS framework
- Strong SQL skills, particularly PostgreSQL
- Familiar with CI/CD pipelines and containerisation (Docker)
- Experience working in Agile teams
- Excellent leadership and communication skills

Salary & Benefits:
- Competitive salary £65,000 - £80,000
- Flexible hours and remote working options
- Generous pension scheme
- Annual training budget
- Wellness and social activities

How to Apply:
Please email your CV and a brief cover letter to careers@nexadigital.co.uk outlining your relevant experience.

title: Node.js & TypeScript Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
Atlas Tech Solutions is a growing software house delivering bespoke backend solutions to clients in healthcare and fintech. We emphasise quality code and close client collaboration.

The Role:
We’re seeking a Node.js & TypeScript Developer to build and maintain backend services. You will work primarily with Express and PostgreSQL to create APIs that power client applications.

Key Duties:
- Develop RESTful APIs using Node.js, TypeScript, and Express
- Design database schemas and write efficient PostgreSQL queries
- Participate in sprint planning and daily stand-ups
- Write unit tests and maintain documentation
- Collaborate closely with front-end developers and QA teams

Requirements:
- Strong experience with Node.js and TypeScript
- Proficient in Express.js
- Solid experience with PostgreSQL databases
- Knowledge of Git and Agile methodologies
- Good communication skills and a problem-solving mindset

Salary & Benefits:
- Salary: £40,000 - £55,000
- Flexible working hours with remote options
- 25 days holiday plus bank holidays
- Pension contribution
- Training and development opportunities

How to Apply:
Send your CV and cover letter to recruitment@atlastech.co.uk with the subject 'Node.js & TypeScript Developer Application'.

title: Mid-Level Node.js Developer (TypeScript)

The Role:
We’re looking for a Mid-Level Node.js Developer proficient in TypeScript to join our backend team. Your focus will be building APIs using NestJS and integrating with PostgreSQL databases.

Responsibilities:

- Collaborate with frontend teams and product owners
- Write clean, maintainable code with automated tests

Requirements:

- Knowledge of NestJS framework
- Strong SQL skills with PostgreSQL
- Familiarity with Git and Agile workflows

Salary & Benefits:

- Hybrid work setup (office and remote)
- 28 days holiday plus bank holidays
- Pension scheme and private health insurance

How to Apply:
Please forward your CV and portfolio to jobs@cobaltdigital.com quoting 'Mid-Level Node.js Developer'.

title: Node.js Backend Engineer

Key Responsibilities:

- Design and maintain PostgreSQL database schemas and queries
- Implement RESTful APIs and ensure their performance
- Collaborate with QA and DevOps for deployment and testing

- Proficient in PostgreSQL

title: Node.js & TypeScript Backend Developer
